title: Comically Large Utensils
body: ![Description](https://i.imgur.com/aw0U3vh.png) A Funny Resource Pack That Adds Comically Large Utensils To Minecraft Just Download It, Load It, And Have Fun! ## • CIT REQUIRED Click On The Image To Go To The Mod Page! ![FAQ](https://i.imgur.com/OGkzWhm.png) ## • How To Use It? > Click **Download**, Select the version of minecraft you use, Then you need to open your **Minecraft Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder.** And then you throw the entire **ZIP file** into the folder and you toggle the resourcepack on. ## • Does The Resource pack Update Itself? > No, the resource pack doesn't update itself you will need to redownload it through the page. ## • How To Get The Utensils? > Rename Any Shovel To **"Comically Large Spoon"**\ > Rename Any Sword To **"Comically Large Knife"**\ > Rename Any Pickaxe/Trident To **"Comically Large Fork"**
